_comment: Fund profile for liquidity + mandate compliance checks. Edit these to match the desk's actual constraints. Anything left as null is treated as 'no constraint on this dimension'.
_aum_jpy_note: Total fund size in yen. Placeholder ¥10B; edit to match real AUM.
_max_position_pct_note: Max position size as % of AUM. 5% of ¥10B = ¥500M target position.
_target_position_jpy_note: If set, overrides aum_jpy * max_position_pct. Use when target sizing is not %-of-AUM.
_max_pct_of_daily_volume_note: Max share of average daily traded yen volume the desk is willing to take. Standard rule of thumb: 20-25%.
_max_days_to_build_note: Trading days to fully build the target position. Liquidity FAIL if days_to_build > this.
_max_days_to_exit_note: Trading days to fully exit. Symmetric with build by default.
_sector_exclusions_note: List of sector_33_name values the mandate excludes (e.g. ['銀行業', '保険業']).
_mcap_floor_jpy_note: Min market cap in yen. null = no floor. Set e.g. 30000000000 for ¥30B floor.
_scale_categories_allowed_note: List of TOPIX scale_category values allowed (e.g. ['TOPIX Small 1', 'TOPIX Small 2', 'TOPIX Mid400']). null = no restriction.
